title: Runko image report (POST /api/deploys/{sha}/images) v1
description: Body of `runko-ci report-image` (§14.10 inverted CD trigger): the post-land image-build workflow POSTs one of these per image it built to record its digest against the landed commit's deploy record. Bearer (deploy-token) authenticated; the POST is an idempotent upsert keyed (trunk sha, image), so retrying a report that died in a single-replica 503 window is safe (migration-findings #33). When the report completes the record's expected image set, runkod emits deploy.images_ready.

image.description: Logical image name / kustomize images: key, e.g. runkod|web|webadmin.

image_ref.description: Full pushed reference sans digest, e.g. ghcr.io/saxocellphone/runko/runkod - reported so the deployer pins image_ref@digest and stays registry-agnostic.

digest.description: e.g. sha256:... - the immutable reference the deployment serves.

run_url.description: Deep link to the CI run that built the image (provenance).
